title: News story about AI
description: Find one real news story about AI causing harm (bias, hallucination, deepfake, or privacy issue). Write: What happened? Which ethical issue does it relate to? What could have been done differently?

title: Medical decisions debate
description: Discussion — Should AI be allowed to make medical decisions without a doctor confirming them? Write your reasoning in 5 sentences. Consider: accuracy, accountability, patient safety, and trust.
